framework.name: AP2 Coalition: 60+ Organizations
framework.description: Google has 60+ organizations collaborating on AP2 including Adyen, Amex, Coinbase, Mastercard, PayPal, Revolut, Worldpay, Etsy, Salesforce, ServiceNow. This is the largest agent-payment coalition announced, dwarfing Visa TAP's partner list.
framework.raw_quote: We're collaborating with a diverse group of more than 60 organizations

source.title: Announcing Agent Payments Protocol (AP2) | Google Cloud Blog
